wiki.title: Dochi Editor Wiki
wiki.intro: Dochi Editor is a CustomNPCs workflow editor that opens inside Minecraft as an MCEF browser screen. The mod provides the editor UI, bridge, and file operations. Gameplay content is installed and maintained through Script Library packages.
wiki.translation_note: This wiki page is the canonical English manual. Localized pages should use the translation keys listed in i18n/dochi-editor-wiki.en_us.json.
wiki.quick_start.title: Quick Start
wiki.quick_start.step.install_editor: Install the Dochi Editor jar matching your loader and Minecraft version.
wiki.quick_start.step.enter_world: Enter the target world before installing world-scoped HTML GUI files.
wiki.quick_start.step.open_editor: Open Dochi Editor with the configured key, commonly F10.
wiki.quick_start.step.set_targets: Set the instance CustomNPCs folder and active world folder from the top bar.
wiki.quick_start.step.external_saving: In Script Library, enable External Saving if it is off, then restart Minecraft if required.
wiki.quick_start.step.open_unlocked: Return to Main Menu and open the unlocked editor.
wiki.requirements.title: Requirements
wiki.requirements.dochi_editor: Provides the UI, MCEF bridge, and file commands.
wiki.requirements.customnpcs: Stores scripts, player scripts, NPC data, and Dochi runtime data.
wiki.requirements.cnpcextended: Provides HTML GUI runtime and extended CustomNPCs APIs.
wiki.requirements.mcef: Displays the editor as an in-game browser screen.
wiki.requirements.permission: Servers may require operator or admin permission for editor and NPC launcher actions.
wiki.paths.title: Folder Rules
wiki.paths.html_warning: HTML GUI files are world-scoped. If an HTML-based tool remains locked, reinstall the relevant HTML package while the correct world is open.
wiki.topbar.title: Top Bar And Targets
wiki.topbar.targets: Check install target and runtime folders.
wiki.topbar.find_running_minecraft: Detect the currently running Minecraft instance.
wiki.topbar.validate: Check whether the selected target is usable.
wiki.topbar.save_preset: Save the current target for reuse.
wiki.topbar.ui: Change language, theme, font, scale, and audio.
wiki.topbar.close: Close the editor screen and return to Minecraft.
wiki.main_menu.title: Main Menu
wiki.main_menu.desc: Main Menu lists available editors and shows whether each editor is enabled or locked.
wiki.main_menu.enabled: The selected editor can be opened now.
wiki.main_menu.locked: A dependency, script, HTML file, permission, or world session is missing.
wiki.script_library.title: Script Library
wiki.script_library.desc: Script Library installs and updates reusable packages.
wiki.npc_editor.title: NPC Editor Launcher
wiki.npc_editor.desc: NPC Editor launches an installed CustomNPCs player script instead of opening a normal HTML editor page.
wiki.dialogue_editor.title: Dialogue Editor
wiki.dialogue_editor.desc: Dialogue Editor builds NPC dialogue nodes, choices, routes, conditions, actions, GUI mapping, and FX.
wiki.gui_maker.title: GUI Maker
wiki.gui_maker.desc: GUI Maker creates dialogue and shop GUI JSON layouts.
wiki.npc_shop.title: NPC Shop
wiki.npc_shop.desc: NPC Shop edits shop JSON, access rules, GUI mapping, products, and stock.
wiki.pokemon_editor.title: Pokemon Editor
wiki.pokemon_editor.desc: Pokemon Editor creates Cobblemon trainer party JSON.
wiki.trainer_editor.title: Trainer Editor
wiki.trainer_editor.desc: Trainer Editor configures trainer NPC detection, battle rounds, conditions, rewards, and sequences.
wiki.soulmob_editor.title: Soulslike Mob Editor
wiki.soulmob_editor.desc: Soulslike Mob Editor tunes action-RPG style mob patterns, events, hitboxes, model preview, and effects.
wiki.tacz_editor.title: TACZ Mob Editor
wiki.tacz_editor.desc: TACZ Mob Editor builds gun-based NPC combat profiles.
wiki.json_workflow.title: JSON Import And Export
wiki.json_workflow.desc: Most editors import and export runtime JSON. Back up existing folders before large changes, package updates, or overwrite prompts.
wiki.troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
wiki.recommended_workflows.title: Recommended Workflows
